name: io.github.AInoAKARI/result-receipt-auditor
title: Result Receipt Auditor
description: A free deterministic Remote MCP that checks whether a claimed AI result is verified real-world value, progress only, insufficient evidence, or rejected test/internal evidence. It separates payments, time savings, risk removal, completed obligations, external adoption, and recipient responses from PRs, deployments, listings, monitoring, self-access, and testnet activity.
